taglines.colab: Discover if they want to collaborate with you

payment.title: Make payment
payment.addPickDescription: To add this pick you need to make a one-time payment.
payment.changePickDescription: To change this pick you need to make a payment.

packs.title: Buy picks
packs.info: Purchased picks never expire. Valid for all apps.
packs.noPicksHint: Buy a pack to keep adding picks.

hero.title: Discover if the interest is mutual
hero.subtitle: A simple idea: find out if someone is thinking of you too, without the risk of rejection.
hero.devNotice: This is a tool in development. We're building something special.

love.tagline: Discover if love is mutual. No risks, no rejection.

plan.tagline: Find friends who choose you back. Because friendship is mutual.

mude.tagline: Discover mutual desire. Discreet and safe.

colab.tagline: Discover if they want to collaborate with you. Professional and discreet.

concept.title: How does it work?
concept.description: Add the people you're interested in. If they also add you, we'll let you both know. If not, no one finds out.

appLanding.readyDescription: Create your free account and start discovering mutual connections.

love.description: What if they're thinking of you too? Discover if love is mutual. No risks. No rejection.

plan.description: Eureka Friends. Friends you know are mutual. There are people you have a great time with… but you never know if they feel the same. Eureka Friends turns that doubt into clarity. Adult friendship: sometimes yes, sometimes no… and that's okay.

mude.description: Eureka MUDE (MUtual DEsire) is an app to find out if desire is mutual between two people who already know each other, without pressure or exposure. It's not for searching. It's for confirming.

colab.description: EUREKA COLAB is a tool to discover if someone wants to collaborate with you. Projects, ideas, business... If the interest is mutual, we connect you. No exposure, no rejection.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Sign up with your phone, email and a secure password.

love.title: Add who interests you
love.description: Choose up to 2 people. Enter their phone number. No one gets notified.

plan.title: Add who interests you
plan.description: Choose up to 5 people. Enter their phone number. No one gets notified.

mude.title: Add who interests you
mude.description: Choose up to 2 people. Enter their phone number. No one gets notified.

colab.title: Add who interests you
colab.description: Choose up to 5 people. Enter their phone number. No one gets notified.

step3.title: Keep it private
step3.description: Your picks are 100% private. Only you know them.

step4.title: Get notified if it's mutual
step4.description: If the other person also picks you, we'll notify you by email and in the app.

step5.description: We're currently in a testing phase. Later on, each person change will have a symbolic cost.

privacy.title: 100% Private
privacy.description: No one can see your picks until there's a match.

noRejection.title: No rejection
noRejection.description: If it's not mutual, no one finds out. Zero embarrassment.

connection.title: Real connection
connection.description: When there's a match, you can contact each other directly.

terms.acceptanceText: By accessing and using EUREKA, you agree to these terms and conditions. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.serviceText: EUREKA is a platform that allows you to discover mutual interests between people. The service connects users who mutually choose each other, maintaining privacy until a match occurs.
terms.userConductText: You agree to use the service responsibly, not harass other users, not create fake accounts, and respect the privacy of other users.
terms.privacyText: Your privacy is fundamental. Your picks are completely private and are only revealed when a mutual match exists. See our Privacy Policy for more details.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or delete your account if you violate these terms. You can delete your account at any time from the settings.
terms.liabilityText: EUREKA is not responsible for interactions between users outside the platform. The service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind.

privacy.dataCollectionText: We collect your phone number, email, name, and the picks you make within the app. We do not collect location data or access your contacts.
privacy.dataUseText: We use your data exclusively for the operation of the service: finding mutual matches and notifying you when they occur.
privacy.dataSharingText: We only share your contact information with users with whom you have a mutual match. We never sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.userRightsText: You have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. You can exercise these rights from your account settings or by contacting us directly.
privacy.dataDeletionText: You can request the complete deletion of your account and all associated data from the settings. This process is irreversible and deletes picks, matches, blocks, and your profile.
privacy.contactText: For any privacy-related inquiries, you can contact us through the application.

block.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to block {{name}}? You will no longer see your match or be able to contact each other.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountDescription: This will permanently delete your account, picks, matches, and all your data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: This action is permanent and irreversible. All your data will be deleted: picks, matches, blocks, and profile. You will not be able to recover your account.

ageVerification.title: Age verification
ageVerification.description: This content is for users aged 18 and over only. By continuing, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old.
ageVerification.legalNote: It is your responsibility to verify that you meet the legal age requirements in your jurisdiction.
